description: Formal constraint reasoning and satisfiability checking using Z3. Covers logical consistency, policy conflict detection, constraint solving, and symbolic execution.
use_cases: Check if a set of logical constraints is satisfiable
Verify that a policy satisfies desired invariants
Find a model that satisfies given constraints
Prove that one formula implies another
example_prompts: Check if all employees can have unique roles given constraints
Verify that if a user is admin then audit logging is enabled
